_comment: Glob patterns for i18n keys that are constructed dynamically at runtime and therefore cannot be detected by a literal string search. Each pattern uses '*' as a wildcard, and '?' to denote single characters (e.g. 12-char Object IDs). Add a new entry here ONLY if you have code that builds the key via string concatenation or template literals.

patterns.reason: Classroom name keys are constructed using I18N_CLASSROOM_${classroomName.toUpperCase()}_NAME.
Classroom course details keys are constructed using I18N_CLASSROOM_${classroomName.toUpperCase()}_COURSE_DETAILS.
Classroom teaser text keys are constructed using I18N_CLASSROOM_${classroomName.toUpperCase()}_TEASER_TEXT.
Classroom topics list intro keys are constructed using I18N_CLASSROOM_${classroomName.toUpperCase()}_TOPICS_LIST_INTRO.
Topic title keys are constructed using I18N_TOPIC_${topicId}_TITLE.
Topic description keys are constructed using I18N_TOPIC_${topicId}_DESCRIPTION.
Subtopic title keys are constructed using I18N_SUBTOPIC_${topicId}_${subtopicUrlFragment}_TITLE.
Story title keys are constructed using I18N_STORY_${storyId}_TITLE.
Story description keys are constructed using I18N_STORY_${storyId}_DESCRIPTION.
Exploration title keys are constructed using I18N_EXPLORATION_${explorationId}_TITLE.
Exploration description keys are constructed using I18N_EXPLORATION_${explorationId}_DESCRIPTION.
Syllabus title keys are constructed using I18N_SYLLABUS_${name.toUpperCase()}_TITLE.
Library category keys are constructed using I18N_LIBRARY_${prefix}_${name} with prefix='CATEGORIES'.
Library groups keys are constructed using I18N_LIBRARY_${prefix}_${name} with prefix='GROUPS'.
Library count keys are constructed using 'I18N_LIBRARY_N_' + itemsName.toUpperCase() (e.g. I18N_LIBRARY_N_CATEGORIES, I18N_LIBRARY_N_LANGUAGES).
Library selection keys are constructed using 'I18N_LIBRARY_ALL_' + itemsName + '_SELECTED'.
Checkpoint celebration message keys are constructed using prefix + '_' + messageKind + '_' + randomValue.
Checkpoint celebration title keys are constructed using prefix + '_' + randomValue.
End chapter milestone message keys are constructed using 'I18N_END_CHAPTER_MILESTONE_MESSAGE_' + chapterCountMessageIndex.
